name: Mrs Fields Lemon Macadamia Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
4. Add butter and cream cheese; mix to form a smooth paste.
5. Add egg and lemon extract; beat on medium speed until light and soft.
6. Scrape down sides of the bowl occasionally.
7. Gradually add flour mixture and macadamia nuts, blending at low speed just until combined.
8. Do not overmix.
9. Drop rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 23-25 minutes.
11. Transfer to a cool, flat surface immediately.
